summary_en: 500,000 shares (1.11% of shares outstanding) to be acquired for up to ¥200M. Acquisition window: May 15, 2026 through March 29, 2027. Method not specified in disclosure.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Related to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Based on Articles of Incorporation Pursuant to Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: Nichia Steel Works has resolved to acquire up to 500,000 of its common shares (representing 1.11% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥200 million. The acquisition period runs from May 15, 2026 through March 29, 2027. The stated rationale is to enhance shareholder returns, improve capital efficiency, and enable flexible capital allocation. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 6,818,219 treasury shares against 44,937,259 shares issued and outstanding (excluding treasury stock). The disclosure does not specify the acquisition method (ToSTNeT-3, open market, or self-tender offer).
